items.e: Reaction = (speed ÷ 10) × 3 m.
Braking = (speed ÷ 10)² m.
Stopping = reaction + braking.
Emergency stop = braking ÷ 2.
Bends, crests, anywhere unclear.
Pedestrian crossings and junctions.
Solid lines or no-overtaking signs.
Always pass left, with clear speed difference.
0.5‰ general · 0.0‰ under 21/Probezeit · drugs zero.
Tiredness: break every ~2 h.
Some medicines impair — read the leaflet.
Join via acceleration lane at traffic speed.
No stopping, reversing, U-turns.
Hard shoulder = emergencies only.
Rettungsgasse: left lane left, others right.
items.d: Rettungsgasse: linke Spur links, alle anderen rechts.

items.e: Aquaplaning: off the gas, no hard braking/steering.
Fog <50 m: max 50, dipped + rear fog light.
Ice/snow: gentle inputs, huge distance, winter tyres.
Tunnel: dipped beam, keep distance.
Passing cyclists: 1.5 m in town, 2 m outside.
items.d: Radfahrer überholen: 1,5 m innerorts, 2 m außerorts.

items.e: Kids and elderly near schools and stops.
Blind-spot check for bikes before turning right.
items.d: Schulterblick auf Räder vor dem Rechtsabbiegen.

items.e: Within 5 m of junctions or crossings.
Bus stops (15 m), cycle lanes, left side (two-way).
Narrow spots, blocking sightlines or others.
DRL is not enough in rain/fog/tunnel — dipped beam on.
Front fog lights only in clearly poor visibility.
Night parking on unlit roads: side lights on.
Hazards: jam end, breakdown, towing — not double-parking.
Overhang back: 1.5 m (3 m short trips); mark beyond 1 m (red flag / light at night).
items.d: Überstand hinten: 1,5 m (3 m kurz); ab 1 m markieren (rote Fahne / nachts Licht).

items.e: Secure every load — loose items become projectiles.
items.d: Ladung sichern — lose Teile werden Geschosse.

items.e: Trailer: coupling, breakaway cable, lights, mirrors.
Minimum tread 1.6 mm (better 3/4 mm summer/winter).
Winter tyres (Alpine symbol) in wintry conditions — situational.
Pressure cold, monthly, before trips.
Brake/ABS/airbag lamp on → check before driving.
Secure: hazards, vest, triangle at 100 m (motorway 150–200 m), behind the barrier.
items.d: Sichern: Warnblinker, Weste, Dreieck bei 100 m (Autobahn 150–200 m), hinter die Planke.

items.e: Then 112 + first aid — helping is a legal duty.
Leaving without identifying = hit-and-run.
Unconscious: recovery position; biker helmet off only for airways.
items.d: Bewusstlos: stabile Seitenlage; Helm nur für Atemwege abnehmen.

items.e: Microsleep kills — stop at first signs; coffee + 20-min nap.
Strong emotions impair like alcohol.
Glasses noted on licence? Mandatory.
Engine off while waiting; no warming up at standstill.
items.d: Motor aus beim Warten; kein Warmlaufenlassen.

items.e: No pointless back-and-forth in residential areas.
Shift early, look ahead, coast to lights.
